stories.headline: 'Supergirl' Bombs at the Box Office, Will Lose $125M - Deadline
stories.summary: Coming away from testing, DC knew there were hurdles ahead. The response to Supergirl was 'good, not great,' and that's not super.

stories.headline: Taylor Frankie Paul's Ex Dakota Mortensen Calls Cops On Her Over Kids - TMZ
stories.summary: Taylor Frankie Paul revealed in a quickly deleted Instagram post over the weekend that police were called to her home ... and TMZ has learned her ex, Dakota Mortensen, is behind that call.

stories.headline: Clive Davis funeral draws stars to honor music legend - USA Today
stories.summary: Music legends and industry leaders came together for Clive Davis' funeral to honor his lasting impact on the business.

stories.headline: Hollywood director Carl Rinsch gets two and half years in prison for defrauding Netflix - BBC
stories.summary: He was accused of using money for a Netflix show on lavish purchases like Rolls Royces and Ferraris.

stories.headline: The Ring and Lilo & Stitch actress Daveigh Chase died of Aids - BBC
stories.summary: The actress, who also crawled out of a TV in horror film The Ring, passed away in LA this month, aged 35.

stories.headline: Aide who planned JFK Jr.'s secret wedding says Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's rumored MSG plans could be a decoy - CBS News
stories.summary: RoseMarie Terenzio, who was JFK Jr.'s former chief of staff and planned his secret wedding to Carolyn Bessette, said she doesn't think Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are getting married at Madison Squ…

stories.headline: Amanda Batula Leaving ‘Summer House’ After 10 Seasons in Wake of #Scamanda Controversy - Variety
stories.summary: Amanda Batula won't return for 'Summer House' Season 11 on Bravo after she and castmate West Wilson began dating, causing a scandal.

stories.headline: Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen Make Rare Appearance With All Four Sibings - TODAY.com
stories.summary: Mary-Kate and Ashley Olsen made a rare public appearance at brother Trent Olsen’s wedding, reuniting with sister Elizabeth and their extended family.
